Crypto Scams

Guides covering fake investment platforms, withdrawal fee traps, romance fraud, and cryptocurrency scam tactics.

Crypto Scams

Crypto Investment Scams in the UK: How to Protect Yourself

A practical guide for UK consumers on recognizing and avoiding cryptocurrency investment scams. Covers common tactics used by fraudsters, red flags to watch for, legitimate vs. fraudulent schemes, and steps to take if you have been targeted or scammed.

Updated 2026-04-17

Crypto Scams

Bitcoin Scams in the UK: How to Protect Yourself from Crypto Fraud

This guide explores the major Bitcoin scams affecting UK consumers, from pump-and-dump schemes to romance fraud involving cryptocurrency. It covers warning signs, prevention strategies, and guidance on reporting fraud to the FCA and Action Fraud, helping you safeguard your digital assets.

Updated 2026-04-17

Crypto Scams

Forex Trading Scams in the UK: How to Protect Yourself

This guide explains how forex trading scams operate in the UK, identifies red flags such as unregulated brokers and unrealistic profit promises, and provides practical steps to verify a broker's FCA authorisation. It covers common tactics used by scammers, including social engineering and pressure sales, and advises readers on reporting fraud and recovering funds.

Updated 2026-04-17

Crypto Scams

Trading Signal Scams: How UK Investors Are Being Targeted

Trading signal scams target UK cryptocurrency investors with false promises of profitable trading tips delivered via Telegram, WhatsApp or exclusive websites. Scammers claim insider knowledge or advanced algorithms can predict market movements, charging subscription fees or requesting deposits that are never recovered. This guide explains how these schemes operate, common tactics used by fraudsters, and practical steps UK investors can take to protect themselves.

Updated 2026-04-17

Crypto Scams

Crypto Investment Scam Checklist: Fast Tests Before You Deposit

A practical list of checks for judging high-return crypto offers, trading groups, and recovery services.

Updated 2026-04-06

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.
